summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: NumberPlane with BLUE unit circle and WHITE pivot at (-1,0). ValueTracker t_tr drives a GREEN line from the pivot with slope t and an always_redraw YELLOW hit point at ((1-t^2)/(1+t^2), 2t/(1+t^2)). Right panel has live t, x, y decimals. Sweep 0.4 -> 2.0 -> -1.8 -> 0.5 and highlight (3/5, 4/5) -> (3,4,5).
